codeReview.summary: The feature cleanly resolves the concrete ESLint findings introduced by the earlier lint-truthfulness restoration without expanding scope or weakening the validator contract. Commit c27cc7d removes the render-time Math.random() purity violation in SidebarMenuSkeleton, fixes the dashboard callback dependency list so the current recentSyncWindowSize is tracked truthfully, and replaces the anonymous Cloudflare worker default export with a named binding. The broader lint/static-check/typecheck truthfulness contract restored by commit 14e021b remains intact in package.json, CI, README, AGENTS, and services metadata, so `pnpm run lint`, `pnpm run static-check`, and `pnpm run typecheck` stay distinct and truthful after the follow-up fix.

summary: Reviewed features.json, both relevant handoffs, the transcript skeleton, commit c27cc7d, and the current validator truth sources. The implementation is review-sized, resolves the reported ESLint findings, and preserves the distinct truthful lint/static-check/typecheck contract, so this feature passes review.
